x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Assignment groups are the routing targets for Now Assist SIR AI recommendations. Without populated groups, AI routing suggestions have nowhere to send incidents and automated assignment will fail.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var cutoff = new GlideDateTime(); cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1); var usedGroups = {}; var gr = new GlideRecord("sn_si_incident"); gr.addQuery("sys_created_on", ">=", cutoff.getValue()); gr.addQuery("assignment_group", "!=", ""); gr.query(); while (gr.next()) { usedGroups[gr.getValue("assignment_group")] = true; } var groupIds = Object.keys(usedGroups); var totalGroups = groupIds.length; if (totalGroups === 0) { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No assignment groups used on security incidents in last 12 months", finding: "No assignment groups found on security incidents. Now Assist SIR AI routing has no group structure to route incidents to." }; } var groupsWithMembers = 0; for (var i = 0; i < groupIds.length; i++) { var memGr = new GlideRecord("sys_user_grmember"); memGr.addQuery("group", groupIds[i]); memGr.setLimit(1); memGr.query(); if (memGr.next()) groupsWithMembers++; } var pct = Math.round((groupsWithMembers / totalGroups) * 100); var actualValue = totalGroups + " security assignment groups | " + groupsWithMembers + " with active members (" + pct + "%)"; if (groupsWithMembers >= 2 && pct >= 80) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: groupsWithMembers + " populated security assignment groups. Now Assist SIR AI routing has well-defined staffed groups to route incidents to." }; } else if (groupsWithMembers >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + groupsWithMembers + " of " + totalGroups + " security assignment groups have members. Now Assist SIR AI routing may attempt to assign incidents to empty groups." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No security assignment groups have active members. Now Assist SIR AI routing cannot function without populated assignment groups." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure all active security assignment groups have members. Populate group membership and assign managers to each group. Now Assist SIR uses group structure for AI-driven incident routing.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c35
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Assignment groups are the routing targets for Now Assist SIR AI recommendations. Without populated groups, AI routing suggestions have nowhere to send incidents and automated assignment will fail.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Security Incident Assignment Group Configuration</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var cutoff = new GlideDateTime(); cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1); var usedGroups = {}; var gr = new GlideRecord("sn_si_incident"); gr.addQuery("sys_created_on", ">=", cutoff.getValue()); gr.addQuery("assignment_group", "!=", ""); gr.query(); while (gr.next()) { usedGroups[gr.getValue("assignment_group")] = true; } var groupIds = Object.keys(usedGroups); var totalGroups = groupIds.length; if (totalGroups === 0) { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No assignment groups used on security incidents in last 12 months", finding: "No assignment groups found on security incidents. Now Assist SIR AI routing has no group structure to route incidents to." }; } var groupsWithMembers = 0; for (var i = 0; i < groupIds.length; i++) { var memGr = new GlideRecord("sys_user_grmember"); memGr.addQuery("group", groupIds[i]); memGr.setLimit(1); memGr.query(); if (memGr.next()) groupsWithMembers++; } var pct = Math.round((groupsWithMembers / totalGroups) * 100); var actualValue = totalGroups + " security assignment groups | " + groupsWithMembers + " with active members (" + pct + "%)"; if (groupsWithMembers >= 2 && pct >= 80) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: groupsWithMembers + " populated security assignment groups. Now Assist SIR AI routing has well-defined staffed groups to route incidents to." }; } else if (groupsWithMembers >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + groupsWithMembers + " of " + totalGroups + " security assignment groups have members. Now Assist SIR AI routing may attempt to assign incidents to empty groups." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No security assignment groups have active members. Now Assist SIR AI routing cannot function without populated assignment groups." }; } })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>SECOPS</module> <number>CHK0006156</number> <order>500</order> <remediation_guidance>Ensure all active security assignment groups have members. Populate group membership and assign managers to each group. Now Assist SIR uses group structure for AI-driven incident routing.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>5e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c35</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
